name: Spicy Pumpkin Sheet Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs in a mixing bowl.
2. Add the pumpkin, sugars, and oil to the bowl; beat well.
3. Gradually add the remaining ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt) to the mixture. Continue beating until everything is well blended.
4. Grease a 10x15 inch jelly roll pan.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 to 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Let the cake cool completely.
8. Frost the cooled cake with cream cheese frosting.
Frosting:
1. In a bowl, beat together 3 ounces of cream cheese and 1/2 cup of margarine until smooth.
2. Stir in 1 teaspoon of vanilla extract.
3. Gradually add 2 cups of powdered sugar, beating well after each addition until the frosting is spreadable.
